title: Eating Animation Modded
description: Adds compatibility between Eating Animation and other mods
body:
# 🍖 Eating Animation Compat

Adds compatibility between Eating Animation and other mods.

## ✨ Compatibility

- [Critters and Companions](https://modrinth.com/project/Yd4wb5wZ)
- [Deeper and Darker](https://modrinth.com/project/fnAffV0n)
- [Living Things](https://modrinth.com/project/UKDLi1GJ)
- [Wilder Wild](https://modrinth.com/project/AtHRJSUW)

## 🚀 Planned Features

Nothing for now, but feel free to suggest any compatibility you want!

## ⚙️ Requirements

You also need the following mod and resource pack for it to work properly:

- [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/project/rUgZvGzi)

## 🙏 Credits

- Thanks to [theoness1](https://modrinth.com/user/jEUgdktF) for [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/project/rUgZvGzi)
- Thanks to [nNoidea](https://github.com/nNoidea) for Eating Animation support for Wilder Wild compatibility! (via [Eating Animation PR #62](https://github.com/Theoness1/EatingAnimation/pull/62))

And a big thanks as well to every other mod creator!! Your mods make the game even more amazing.

## 📦 Modpack

Feel free to include Eating Animation Compat in modpacks.

## 🌐 Looking for a server? Support me at the same time!

Want to play with friends? Get your own server with [Wabbanode](http://wabbanode.com/affiliate/wildlight).

Use the code **WILDLIGHT** to support me and get 25% off.

[![Wabbanode server](https://i.postimg.cc/hvk4z0Vv/banner-3.png)](http://wabbanode.com/affiliate/wildlight)
